name: Gold ATM - Atlanta Jewelry, Diamonds, Watches, Loans
description_short: Atlanta luxury pawn shop and jewelry buyer with 4.9/5 stars across 1,000+ reviews. Buys and loans against gold, designer items, watches, and diamonds at two locations.
description_long:
Gold ATM is a specialized pawn shop operating in the Atlanta market with two physical locations in Wildwood and Lenox. The business positions itself as a luxury goods buyer and collateral lender, focusing on high-value items rather than general pawn services. The company maintains strong customer ratings (4.9/5 stars with over 1,000 reviews) and emphasizes being "Atlanta's Highest Rated Luxury Pawn Shop." They operate under a traditional pawn model where customers can either sell items outright or use them as collateral for loans.

Gold ATM's core services revolve around buying and lending against luxury goods. They accept gold jewelry, designer handbags (including Chanel), Rolex watches, diamonds, fine watches, designer jewelry, and solid gold items. The business model allows customers to either receive cash for items sold directly or to use these items as collateral for pawn loans. This dual approach gives customers flexibility depending on whether they need permanent cash or temporary liquidity.

The company differentiates itself through specialization in luxury items rather than general merchandise, reflected in their branding and marketing. Their high review volume and 4.9-star rating suggest strong customer satisfaction and repeat business. The dual-location strategy in affluent Atlanta neighborhoods (Wildwood and Lenox) targets a customer base with valuable goods. They also offer appointment scheduling, indicating a more personalized service model than typical pawn shops.

Gold ATM serves the traditional pawn market—customers needing short-term liquidity against valuable collateral or those liquidating jewelry and luxury goods. However, customers should understand that pawn loans typically carry higher interest rates than traditional personal loans, and collateral will be forfeited if loans aren't repaid. The published hours and appointment system suggest this is a more curated experience, though specific loan terms, APRs, and holding periods are not disclosed on the website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Exceptional customer ratings: 4.9/5 stars with over 1,000 reviews in Atlanta market
Specializes in luxury items only (gold, designer watches, Chanel, Rolex, diamonds) rather than general merchandise
Two convenient Atlanta locations in affluent neighborhoods (Wildwood and Lenox)
Offers appointment scheduling for personalized service rather than walk-in only model
Accepts both sales and pawn loans—customers can choose to sell outright or use items as collateral
Straightforward buy-what-we-list approach with clear item categories published on website
Established online presence with direct phone line (770-766-9342) for customer contact
cons: Pawn loans typically carry higher interest rates and fees than personal loans—specific APR and terms not disclosed on website
Limited business hours (M-F or W-F, 10am-5pm, with Sat only at Wildwood location) may not accommodate all customers
No pricing, valuation, or loan term details published—customers must call or visit for quotes
Only two locations in Atlanta—not accessible to customers outside the metro area
Website lacks information on holding periods, what happens if loans default, or specific collateral requirements
best_for: Atlanta residents with luxury jewelry, watches, or designer goods who need short-term cash without selling
People liquidating jewelry collections or high-end items for quick cash
Customers with valuable Rolex watches, gold items, or designer handbags seeking immediate payment
Those who prefer in-person evaluation and negotiation of valuable goods over online transactions
diagnosis: Gold ATM is best for Atlanta residents who own valuable luxury items (jewelry, watches, designer goods) and need quick cash either through outright sale or short-term pawn loans. The main caveat is that pawn loans carry higher costs than traditional personal loans, terms are not publicly disclosed, and customers must contact the shop directly for pricing and loan specifics—making cost comparison difficult upfront.
services: Gold jewelry buying and pawn loans
Rolex and fine watch buying and pawn loans
Designer jewelry buying and pawn loans
In-person item appraisal at two Atlanta locations
Direct phone consultation (770-766-9342 or 770-651-0857 for Lenox)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 3500 Lenox Rd NE suite 1500, Atlanta, GA 30326
